summary: A vertical clip. It shows a close booking-style photograph of a man with curly dark hair and a full beard against a gray backdrop, then a printed photograph of a smiling woman with eyeglasses wearing a red and dark top, clipped to a white board with a wooden clothespin.

script.scene: A close booking-style photograph of a bearded man against a gray backdrop.
A printed photo of a smiling woman with eyeglasses is shown clipped to a board.
